[[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] '''Lerron''' was one of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] accomplished diplomats during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. While traveling aboard the diplomatic cruiser ''[[SkyWind III]]'', Lerron was the target of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Attack on SkyWind III|kidnapping attempt]].

{{Char-stub}}
